halt_handoff.text: Loop 6 ended at HALT_STAGNATION/oscillation — missing disposition for F-500 on purpose.

verdict_explanation: Loop cycled on a recurring finding; smoke fixture exercising G30 failure.

findings.title: Domain-policy import of CoreData
findings.why_it_matters: Persistence framework type bleeds into domain; policy is no longer portable.
findings.what_is_wrong: OrderPolicy.swift imports CoreData and uses NSManagedObject subclasses directly.
findings.leverage_impact: Domain types are tied to a single persistence backend.
findings.locality_impact: Refactor cost grows linearly with call sites.
findings.why_weakens_submission: Domain-framework leakage; long-term refactor cost grows with each call site.
findings.minimal_correction_path: Define a domain Order struct; map at the persistence seam.

narrative: Oscillation halt; G30 should reject because F-500 is missing from disposition list.
unresolved_reason: F-500 keeps reappearing after attempted fixes; deferred to user_decision in next loop.
